Translation.Description: Only Wraiths can wear this amulet directly against bare skin without being wracked with violent shivers of disgust. Irrational phobias aside, you'll be able to lord over the eight legged ones and augment the potency of your villainous venoms. It's important to remember those benefits when the next retching bout occurs.
Translation.Provides: Summon Arachnid - Summons a random level 6 Spider
